notes:
Highest information asymmetry candidate. Clinical trial results, AdCom briefing
documents, company SEC filings, and biotech-Twitter sentiment all leak ahead of
decisions. Low event count (a few dozen approval decisions per year on Kalshi) means
LightGBM is the right model class, not a transformer.

sources_error.kalshi_contracts:
not_implemented: adapter 'Kalshi' is not implemented yet.
  Source role: Kalshi event contract closing prices via https://trading-api.readme.io/reference/getmarkets (env KALSHI_EMAIL/PASSWORD) or third-party predictiondata.dev archive.
  Implement quant/adapters/kalshi.py with class signature `fetch(market, source_params) -> DataFrame`.
sources_error.clinicaltrials:
not_implemented: adapter 'ClinicalTrials.gov' is not implemented yet.
  Source role: trial registrations + status via https://clinicaltrials.gov/api/. source_params['nct_ids'] optional.
  Implement quant/adapters/clinicaltrials.gov.py with class signature `fetch(market, source_params) -> DataFrame`.
sources_error.sec_edgar:
not_implemented: adapter 'SEC EDGAR' is not implemented yet.
  Source role: SEC company filings via https://www.sec.gov/edgar.shtml. source_params['ciks'] = list of CIKs.
  Implement quant/adapters/sec edgar.py with class signature `fetch(market, source_params) -> DataFrame`.
sources_error.news_scraper:
not_implemented: adapter 'News scraper' is not implemented yet.
  Source role: generic article scraper used by agent orchestration (Claude/Codex). source_params['urls'] or ['queries']. Outputs (timestamp, text, source_url) rows.
  Implement quant/adapters/news scraper.py with class signature `fetch(market, source_params) -> DataFrame`.
